text:

@@ -2,10 +2,10 @@

-PORTVERSION=	1.7.3

 CATEGORIES=	devel
-MASTER_SITES=	APACHE

+		APACHE
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	${PORTNAME}/stable
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	-cpp
 DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-src-${PORTVERSION}
